description: Composition Green and white gingham check shirt made of 100% cotton with a washed effect, that have long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a button on the elbow level that can be used to roll up and keep the sleeve in place with a flap, spread collar, front buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest and curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print/embroidery Update your casual style with this gingham check shirt from belmonte. The sleeves can be buttoned or rolled up to give two different looks, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans or khakhis and leather slip-on shoes for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
